name: RuPaul's Drag Race Global All Stars
original_name: RuPaul's Drag Race Global All Stars
overview: Twelve fan favorites drag queens from around the world will each represent their countries as they compete for the title of "Queen of the Mothertucking World," a grand prize of $200,000, and a spot in the international pavilion at the Drag Race Hall of Fame.

trailers.title: Global All Stars Episode 1 First Lewk 🌎 RuPaul’s Drag Race
Meet the Queens of RuPaul's Drag Race Global All Stars ⭐
